languages.text: "Не совсем так. Есть данные, что в первые месяцы после высадки Первого Призыва планета была куда опаснее. Полноценных исследований тогда никто, конечно же, не вел — ну или с полком не поделился. Но после все успокоилось. Явление избранников Бога-Императора приводит в ужас ксенопорчу Заркова, не иначе".

"That's not quite true. There is evidence that the planet was far more dangerous in the months after the First Call-Up landed. No one was carrying out any comprehensive surveys at that time, of course — or, at least, they didn't share them with the regiment. But after that, everything settled down. Now the appearance of the God-Emperor's chosen ones has struck terror into Zarkov's xenocurse, that must be it."
languages.original_text: "Не совсем так. Есть данные, что в первые месяцы после высадки Первого Призыва планета была куда опаснее. Полноценных исследований тогда никто, конечно же, не вел — ну или с полком не поделился. Но после все успокоилось. Явление избранников Бога-Императора приводит в ужас ксенопорчу Заркова, не иначе".

No one was carrying out any comprehensive surveys at that time, of course — or, at least, they didn't share them with the regiment. But after that, everything settled down. Now the appearance of the God-Emperor's chosen ones has struck terror into Zarkov's xenocurse, that must be it."

"That's not quite true. There is evidence that the planet was far more dangerous in the months after the First Call-Up landed. No one was carrying out any comprehensive surveys at that time, of course — or, at least, they didn't share them with the regiment. But after that, everything settled down. Now the appearance of the God-Emperor's chosen ones has struck terror into Zarkov's xenocurse, that must be it."

"That's not quite true. There is evidence that the planet was far more dangerous in the months after the First Call-Up landed. No one was carrying out any comprehensive surveys at that time, of course — or, at least, they didn't share them with the regiment. But after that, everything settled down. Now the appearance of the God-Emperor's chosen ones has struck terror into Zarkov's xenocurse, that must be it."

languages.text: 「それは少し違う。最初の呼びかけの直後に惑星ははるかに危険だったという証拠がある。もちろん、その時は誰も包括的な調査を行っていなかった。少なくとも、その結果を連隊に共有したわけじゃない。でも、その後は落ち着いてきた。神帝の選民が現れたことでザルコフの異種呪いが恐怖に陥ったのだろう」
languages.original_text: "That's not quite true. There is evidence that the planet was far more dangerous in the months after the First Call-Up landed. No one was carrying out any comprehensive surveys at that time, of course — or, at least, they didn't share them with the regiment. But after that, everything settled down. Now the appearance of the God-Emperor's chosen ones has struck terror into Zarkov's xenocurse, that must be it."

traits.locale_text: 「それは少し違う。最初の呼びかけの直後に惑星ははるかに危険だったという証拠がある。もちろん、その時は誰も包括的な調査を行っていなかった。少なくとも、その結果を連隊に共有したわけじゃない。でも、その後は落ち着いてきた。神帝の選民が現れたことでザルコフの異種呪いが恐怖に陥ったのだろう。」

languages.text: «Eso no es del todo cierto. Hay pruebas de que el planeta era mucho más peligroso en los meses posteriores a la llegada de los primeros llamados. Nadie podía analizarlo, claro... o, si alguien lo hizo, no lo compartió con el regimiento, al menos. Pero después, todo se calmó. La aparición de un{mf||a} elegid{mf|o|a} del Dios Emperador ha despertado el terror en la maldición xenos de Zarkov, y esta debe ser su respuesta».
languages.original_text: "That's not quite true. There is evidence that the planet was far more dangerous in the months after the First Call-Up landed. No one was carrying out any comprehensive surveys at that time, of course — or, at least, they didn't share them with the regiment. But after that, everything settled down. Now the appearance of the God-Emperor's chosen ones has struck terror into Zarkov's xenocurse, that must be it."

traits.locale_text: «Eso no es del todo cierto. Hay pruebas de que el planeta era mucho más peligroso en los meses posteriores a la llegada de los primeros llamados. Nadie podía analizarlo, claro... o, si alguien lo hizo, no lo compartió con el regimiento, al menos. Pero después, todo se calmó. La aparición de un{mf||a} elegid{mf|o|a} del Dios Emperador ha despertado el terror en la maldición xenos de Zarkov, y esta debe ser su respuesta».

languages.text: “并非完全没有先例。有记录表明，在初代征召者登陆后的数月间，行星环境远比现在凶险。当然，当时并未进行系统性的全面勘察，至少相关情报从未向军团公开。随后，一切还是逐渐平息了。一定是因为如今神皇神选者的降临，令扎尔科夫的异形诅咒陷入了狂乱。”
languages.original_text: "That's not quite true. There is evidence that the planet was far more dangerous in the months after the First Call-Up landed. No one was carrying out any comprehensive surveys at that time, of course — or, at least, they didn't share them with the regiment. But after that, everything settled down. Now the appearance of the God-Emperor's chosen ones has struck terror into Zarkov's xenocurse, that must be it."

traits.locale_text: “并非完全没有先例。有记录表明，在初代征召者登陆后的数月间，行星环境远比现在凶险。当然，当时并未进行系统性的全面勘察，至少相关情报从未向军团公开。随后，一切还是逐渐平息了。一定是因为如今神皇神选者的降临，令扎尔科夫的异形诅咒陷入了狂乱。”

languages.text: "Das ist nicht ganz richtig. Es gibt Hinweise, dass der Planet in den Monaten nach der Landung der Ersten Einberufung weitaus gefährlicher war. Damals hat natürlich niemand umfassende Untersuchungen angestellt ... oder das Regiment darüber informiert. Danach hat sich die Lage allerdings beruhigt. Nun hat die Ankunft der Auserwählten des Gottimperators den Xenofluch von Zarkov aufgeschreckt, das muss es sein."
languages.original_text: "That's not quite true. There is evidence that the planet was far more dangerous in the months after the First Call-Up landed. No one was carrying out any comprehensive surveys at that time, of course — or, at least, they didn't share them with the regiment. But after that, everything settled down. Now the appearance of the God-Emperor's chosen ones has struck terror into Zarkov's xenocurse, that must be it."

traits.locale_text: "Das ist nicht ganz richtig. Es gibt Hinweise, dass der Planet in den Monaten nach der Landung der Ersten Einberufung weitaus gefährlicher war. Damals hat natürlich niemand umfassende Untersuchungen angestellt ... oder das Regiment darüber informiert. Danach hat sich die Lage allerdings beruhigt. Nun hat die Ankunft der Auserwählten des Gottimperators den Xenofluch von Zarkov aufgeschreckt, das muss es sein."

languages.text: "Bu pek doğru değil. İlk Sevk Grubu'nun inişinden sonraki aylarda gezegenin çok daha tehlikeli olduğuna dair kanıtlar mevcut. Tabii o zamanlar kimse kapsamlı araştırmalar yapmıyordu... Ya da en azından bunları alayla paylaşmadılar. Sonra her şey duruldu. Şimdi Tanrı İmparator'un seçilmişlerinin gelişi, Zarkov'un zenolanetine korku salmış olmalı. Sebebi bu olmalı."
languages.original_text: "That's not quite true. There is evidence that the planet was far more dangerous in the months after the First Call-Up landed. No one was carrying out any comprehensive surveys at that time, of course — or, at least, they didn't share them with the regiment. But after that, everything settled down. Now the appearance of the God-Emperor's chosen ones has struck terror into Zarkov's xenocurse, that must be it."

traits.locale_text: "Bu pek doğru değil. İlk Sevk Grubu'nun inişinden sonraki aylarda gezegenin çok daha tehlikeli olduğuna dair kanıtlar mevcut. Tabii o zamanlar kimse kapsamlı araştırmalar yapmıyordu... Ya da en azından bunları alayla paylaşmadılar. Sonra her şey duruldu. Şimdi Tanrı İmparator'un seçilmişlerinin gelişi, Zarkov'un zenolanetine korku salmış olmalı. Sebebi bu olmalı."

languages.text: « Ce n'est pas tout à fait vrai. Nous avons la preuve que cette planète était bien plus dangereuse, dans les mois qui ont suivi la Première Mobilisation. Évidemment, personne n'a mené d'enquête exhaustive à l'époque. En tout cas, aucune n'a été partagée avec le régiment. Avec le temps, la situation s'est apaisée. L'arrivée des élus de l'Empereur-Dieu a dû frapper de terreur le fléau xénos de Zarkov. Il n'y a pas d'autre explication. »
languages.original_text: "That's not quite true. There is evidence that the planet was far more dangerous in the months after the First Call-Up landed. No one was carrying out any comprehensive surveys at that time, of course — or, at least, they didn't share them with the regiment. But after that, everything settled down. Now the appearance of the God-Emperor's chosen ones has struck terror into Zarkov's xenocurse, that must be it."
